@@ -0,0 +1,85 @@
+---
+assignees:
+- claude-code
+depends_on:
+- 01KPEMYJV7BMTJB6GZ8MGTD04J
+position_column: todo
+position_ordinal: d880
+title: 'Commands: migrate entity.delete/archive/unarchive/copy/cut/paste to per_entity auto-emit; purge entity schema opt-ins'
+---
+## What
+
+With the `per_entity` mechanism landed (card 01KPEMYJV7BMTJB6GZ8MGTD04J), convert the seven cross-cutting `entity.*` commands to auto-emit on every entity moniker. Delete every redundant opt-in entry from `task.yaml`, `tag.yaml`, `project.yaml`, `column.yaml`, `board.yaml`, and `actor.yaml`. Ensure Rust `available()` impls correctly opt specific entity types out where the command does not apply.
+
+### Commands to migrate
+
+Each gets `per_entity: true` in `swissarmyhammer-commands/builtin/commands/entity.yaml`:
+
+- `entity.delete`
+- `entity.archive`
+- `entity.unarchive`
+- `entity.copy`
+- `entity.cut`
+- `entity.paste`
+- `entity.update_field` â€” stays `visible: false`; `per_entity: true` only if the UI actually surfaces it per-entity (audit first; if not, leave the flag off).
+- `entity.add` â€” do NOT mark `per_entity` here. Creation is driven by the dynamic `entity.add:{type}` moniker from view scope, not by per-entity auto-emit.
+
+Also confirm `context_menu: true` or `visible: false` defaults in `entity.yaml` match what the frontend expects. Previously these defaults came from entity schemas; now they come from `entity.yaml`.
+
+### Rust availability opt-outs
+
+Audit and, where needed, tighten `available()` for each command:
+
+- `DeleteEntityCmd` (`swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/entity_commands.rs`) â€” currently errors on unknown types at execute time. Add supported-type check in `available()` so the context menu hides it on attachments: return false when target starts with `attachment:`.
+- `ArchiveEntityCmd` / `UnarchiveEntityCmd` â€” same audit. Attachments, columns, and board probably can't archive; return false for those targets.
+- `CopyTaskCmd`, `CutTaskCmd`, `PasteTaskCmd` (`swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/clipboard_commands.rs`) â€” these are named *Task* but `per_entity: true` would emit them for every entity. Audit behavior: if they only support tasks today, limit `available()` to tag and task monikers. Rename the structs (`CopyEntityCmd`, etc.) as a follow-up if scope expands.
+
+### Entity schemas to clean up
+
+After this card, these entity YAMLs contain ONLY type-specific command references (or nothing):
+
+- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/entities/task.yaml` â€” keep `task.move`, `task.delete`, `task.untag`, `task.doThisNext`, `attachment.delete`. Delete `entity.copy`, `entity.cut`, `entity.paste`, `entity.archive`, `entity.unarchive`. (`ui.inspect` is already gone from the pilot card.)
+- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/entities/tag.yaml` â€” keep `tag.update`. Delete `entity.archive`, `entity.copy`, `entity.cut`.
+- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/entities/project.yaml` â€” delete `entity.archive`. `project.delete` is retired in card 01KPEME1897275TKE61EKN6EVX.
+- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/entities/column.yaml` â€” keep `column.reorder`, `entity.paste` (if pasting tasks onto columns is column-specific UX). Audit whether `entity.paste` should be cross-cutting; if yes, delete the opt-in.
+- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/entities/board.yaml` â€” audit `entity.paste`; same question.
+- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/entities/actor.yaml` â€” after `ui.inspect` removal, `commands:` becomes empty; remove the section.
+- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/entities/attachment.yaml` â€” already empty.
+
+### Files to touch
+
+- `swissarmyhammer-commands/builtin/commands/entity.yaml`
+- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/entities/task.yaml`, `tag.yaml`, `project.yaml`, `column.yaml`, `board.yaml`, `actor.yaml`
+- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/entity_commands.rs` â€” tighten `available()` on `DeleteEntityCmd`, `ArchiveEntityCmd`, `UnarchiveEntityCmd`.
+- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/clipboard_commands.rs` â€” tighten `available()` on copy/cut/paste.
+
+### Subtasks
+
+- [ ] Add `per_entity: true` to the seven `entity.*` declarations in `entity.yaml`.
+- [ ] Tighten `available()` impls â€” specify supported target types.
+- [ ] Delete all cross-cutting entity.* entries from entity schema YAMLs.
+- [ ] Run hygiene test `yaml_hygiene_no_cross_cutting_in_entity_schemas` â€” now GREEN.
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+
+- [ ] The hygiene test from card 01KPEM811W5XE6WVHDQVRCZ4B0 passes.
+- [ ] Right-click on a tag shows **Delete Tag** and it works (was broken â€” now surfaces via auto-emit).
+- [ ] Right-click on a task still shows Copy / Cut / Paste / Archive / Delete / Do This Next / Move / Remove Tag with correct keybindings.
+- [ ] Right-click on an attachment does NOT show entity.delete / entity.archive (opt-out via `available()`).
+- [ ] `grep -E 'id: entity\\.(delete|archive|unarchive|copy|cut|paste)' swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/entities/` returns zero matches.
+
+## Tests
+
+- [ ] Add `entity_delete_auto_emits_for_tag_and_project` in `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/scope_commands.rs` tests â€” parallels `ui_inspect_auto_emits_on_every_entity_type` from the pilot.
+- [ ] Add `entity_archive_not_available_on_attachment` â€” assert the `available()` opt-out filters the command out of attachment context menus.
+- [ ] Update `register_commands_returns_expected_count` expected total if any commands change.
+- [ ] Existing `delete_entity_deletes_tag`, `archive_entity_archives_task`, etc. tests all still pass after the YAML cleanup.
+- [ ] Run command: `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-kanban` â€” all green.
+
+## Workflow
+
+- Use `/tdd` â€” drive by running the hygiene test and `entity_delete_auto_emits_for_tag_and_project` first; they pin down when the migration is complete.
+
+#commands
+
+Depends on: 01KPEMYJV7BMTJB6GZ8MGTD04J (mechanism must exist first)
\ No newline at end of file

changes.value: Commands: migrate entity.delete/archive/unarchive/copy/cut/paste to per_entity auto-emit; purge entity schema opt-ins

## What

With the `per_entity` mechanism landed (card 01KPEMYJV7BMTJB6GZ8MGTD04J), convert the seven cross-cutting `entity.*` commands to auto-emit on every entity moniker. Delete every redundant opt-in entry from `task.yaml`, `tag.yaml`, `project.yaml`, `column.yaml`, `board.yaml`, and `actor.yaml`. Ensure Rust `available()` impls correctly opt specific entity types out where the command does not apply.

### Commands to migrate

Each gets `per_entity: true` in `swissarmyhammer-commands/builtin/commands/entity.yaml`:

- `entity.delete`
- `entity.archive`
- `entity.unarchive`
- `entity.copy`
- `entity.cut`
- `entity.paste`
- `entity.update_field` â€” stays `visible: false`; `per_entity: true` only if the UI actually surfaces it per-entity (audit first; if not, leave the flag off).
- `entity.add` â€” do NOT mark `per_entity` here. Creation is driven by the dynamic `entity.add:{type}` moniker from view scope, not by per-entity auto-emit.

Also confirm `context_menu: true` or `visible: false` defaults in `entity.yaml` match what the frontend expects. Previously these defaults came from entity schemas; now they come from `entity.yaml`.

### Rust availability opt-outs

Audit and, where needed, tighten `available()` for each command:

- `DeleteEntityCmd` (`swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/entity_commands.rs`) â€” currently errors on unknown types at execute time. Add supported-type check in `available()` so the context menu hides it on attachments: return false when target starts with `attachment:`.
- `ArchiveEntityCmd` / `UnarchiveEntityCmd` â€” same audit. Attachments, columns, and board probably can't archive; return false for those targets.
- `CopyTaskCmd`, `CutTaskCmd`, `PasteTaskCmd` (`swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/clipboard_commands.rs`) â€” these are named *Task* but `per_entity: true` would emit them for every entity. Audit behavior: if they only support tasks today, limit `available()` to tag and task monikers. Rename the structs (`CopyEntityCmd`, etc.) as a follow-up if scope expands.

### Entity schemas to clean up

After this card, these entity YAMLs contain ONLY type-specific command references (or nothing):

- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/entities/task.yaml` â€” keep `task.move`, `task.delete`, `task.untag`, `task.doThisNext`, `attachment.delete`. Delete `entity.copy`, `entity.cut`, `entity.paste`, `entity.archive`, `entity.unarchive`. (`ui.inspect` is already gone from the pilot card.)
- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/entities/tag.yaml` â€” keep `tag.update`. Delete `entity.archive`, `entity.copy`, `entity.cut`.
- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/entities/project.yaml` â€” delete `entity.archive`. `project.delete` is retired in card 01KPEME1897275TKE61EKN6EVX.
- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/entities/column.yaml` â€” keep `column.reorder`, `entity.paste` (if pasting tasks onto columns is column-specific UX). Audit whether `entity.paste` should be cross-cutting; if yes, delete the opt-in.
- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/entities/board.yaml` â€” audit `entity.paste`; same question.
- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/entities/actor.yaml` â€” after `ui.inspect` removal, `commands:` becomes empty; remove the section.
- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/entities/attachment.yaml` â€” already empty.

### Files to touch

- `swissarmyhammer-commands/builtin/commands/entity.yaml`
- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/entities/task.yaml`, `tag.yaml`, `project.yaml`, `column.yaml`, `board.yaml`, `actor.yaml`
- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/entity_commands.rs` â€” tighten `available()` on `DeleteEntityCmd`, `ArchiveEntityCmd`, `UnarchiveEntityCmd`.
- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/clipboard_commands.rs` â€” tighten `available()` on copy/cut/paste.

### Subtasks

- [ ] Add `per_entity: true` to the seven `entity.*` declarations in `entity.yaml`.
- [ ] Tighten `available()` impls â€” specify supported target types.
- [ ] Delete all cross-cutting entity.* entries from entity schema YAMLs.
- [ ] Run hygiene test `yaml_hygiene_no_cross_cutting_in_entity_schemas` â€” now GREEN.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] The hygiene test from card 01KPEM811W5XE6WVHDQVRCZ4B0 passes.
- [ ] Right-click on a tag shows **Delete Tag** and it works (was broken â€” now surfaces via auto-emit).
- [ ] Right-click on a task still shows Copy / Cut / Paste / Archive / Delete / Do This Next / Move / Remove Tag with correct keybindings.
- [ ] Right-click on an attachment does NOT show entity.delete / entity.archive (opt-out via `available()`).
- [ ] `grep -E 'id: entity\\.(delete|archive|unarchive|copy|cut|paste)' swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/entities/` returns zero matches.

## Tests

- [ ] Add `entity_delete_auto_emits_for_tag_and_project` in `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/scope_commands.rs` tests â€” parallels `ui_inspect_auto_emits_on_every_entity_type` from the pilot.
- [ ] Add `entity_archive_not_available_on_attachment` â€” assert the `available()` opt-out filters the command out of attachment context menus.
- [ ] Update `register_commands_returns_expected_count` expected total if any commands change.
- [ ] Existing `delete_entity_deletes_tag`, `archive_entity_archives_task`, etc. tests all still pass after the YAML cleanup.
- [ ] Run command: `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-kanban` â€” all green.

## Workflow

- Use `/tdd` â€” drive by running the hygiene test and `entity_delete_auto_emits_for_tag_and_project` first; they pin down when the migration is complete.
